encodings: y: Course.CName sorted by enrollment count
visualization.description: Horizontal bar chart showing course enrollment distribution colored by academic division. Courses sorted by enrollment count with top/bottom extremes visually prominent.

effect.description: Select courses to filter downstream views

visualization.description: Stacked bar chart showing enrollment distribution across temporal patterns (days/hours combinations)
Box plots with jittered points showing age distribution per academic division

outputs.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) to observe enrollment distribution across courses and divisions. Selecting high/low enrollment courses triggers Views 2-3 (Exploration). View 2 reveals temporal patterns for selected courses while View 3 compares age distributions between divisions, enabling identification of demographic influences.
